Leave empty for CN: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 | US: https://dashscope-us.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 | SGP: https://{WorkspaceId}.ap-southeast-1.maas.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 | EU: https://{WorkspaceId}.eu-central-1.maas.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1. Replace {WorkspaceId} with your actual workspace ID.

copilot-adapter.walkthrough.title: AI Models Adapter for Copilot Chat
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.description: Set up AI models in Copilot Chat.
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.apiKey.title: Add a model provider
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.apiKey.descr:
Two methods are available. The Language Models panel is the recommended native approach.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage) · [Add API Key](command:copilot-adapter.addApiKey)
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.showModels.d:
Language models may be hidden by default. Open the VS Code Language Models panel to make them visible.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.advancedSett:
Fine-tune provider settings, set up a vision proxy, or enable experimental features.
[Open settings](command:copilot-adapter.openSettings)
Route image attachments through a vision-capable model so text-only models can handle them.
[Configure Vision Proxy](command:copilot-adapter.setVisionProxyModel)
copilot-adapter.config.title: AI Models Adapter
copilot-adapter.config.maxTokens.descrip: Cap on output tokens per request. Use 0 for the provider's default (no limit). Lower values help manage costs.
copilot-adapter.config.debug.description:
Controls diagnostic output level. Token usage is always reported to Copilot.

- `off` - no output
- `info` - metadata only, safe to share
- `meta` - adds model id, apiId and endpoint details
- `verbose` - full request dump + masked API key written to disk
copilot-adapter.config.debug.off.label: Off
copilot-adapter.config.debug.off.descrip: No output logged. Token usage is always reported to Copilot.
copilot-adapter.config.debug.info.label: Info
copilot-adapter.config.debug.info.descri: Logs request metadata to the output channel - model, endpoint, tool names. No prompt content. Safe to include in issue reports. [View Logs](command:copilot-adapter.showLogs)
copilot-adapter.config.debug.meta.label: Meta
copilot-adapter.config.debug.meta.descri: Extends Info with model id, apiId, endpoint and partial key. Safe to share. [View Logs](command:copilot-adapter.showLogs)
copilot-adapter.config.debug.verbose.des: Writes full request payloads and masked API keys to disk. Contains prompt content - keep local. [View Records](command:copilot-adapter.openRequestRecordsFolder)
Vision proxy model for image attachments. Enter `off` to disable. [Choose from available models](command:copilot-adapter.setVisionProxyModel).
copilot-adapter.config.visionProxyPrompt: System prompt given to the vision proxy when converting image attachments to text descriptions.
copilot-adapter.config.requestTimeout.de: HTTP request timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.
copilot-adapter.config.requestRetries.de: Number of automatic retries on rate-limited (429) or unavailable (503) responses. Retries use exponential back-off and only occur before any content is streamed.
copilot-adapter.config.imageTokenEstimat: Estimated token cost per image used when counting tokens for context-window tracking.
copilot-adapter.config.maxWarmupRounds.d: Maximum preflight warmup rounds per request when tool stabilization is enabled.
copilot-adapter.config.providerEndpoints: Per-provider endpoint overrides. Set a custom base URL for any provider. **When set, this value forcibly overrides any endpoint selected or configured when adding the model.** Leave empty to use the per-provider API Endpoint setting or built-in default.
Custom endpoint for the DeepSeek provider. Overrides the per-provider API Endpoint setting. Leave empty to use the built-in default `https://api.deepseek.com`.
Custom endpoint for the MiniMax provider. Overrides the per-provider API Endpoint setting. Leave empty to use the per-provider selection or built-in default.
Custom endpoint for the Qwen (Alibaba DashScope) provider. Overrides the per-provider API Endpoint setting. Leave empty to use the per-provider setting or built-in default cn-beijing endpoint.
Custom endpoint for the Zhipu BigModel (GLM) provider. Overrides the per-provider API Endpoint setting. Leave empty to use the per-provider selection or built-in default.
Custom endpoint for the Moonshot (Kimi) provider. Overrides the per-provider API Endpoint setting. Leave empty to use the per-provider selection or built-in default.
